creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 227172
"git diff" to update the port

- Update 0.26 -> 0.27
- Changes: https://metacpan.org/dist/Any-Moose/changes
- mark as DEPRECATED
	Upstream has indicated that it is deprecated 
	and no longer suitable for use.
	She recommends to use devel/p5-Moo instead.
	See the notice at: https://metacpan.org/dist/Any-Moose

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.0-RELEASE-p3
pkg 1.17.1
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
